data.title: Robinhood is gifting OpenAI and SpaceX tokens to eligible European users.
data.summary: Robinhood EU launched the first private company stock tokens for OpenAI and SpaceX, with free tokens claimable in-app by eligible users until July 7.

content: News, on June 30th, Robinhood announced that Robinhood EU has launched the world's first batch of private company stock tokens, including tokens for OpenAI
Robinhood EU is offering free tokens for the initial private company stocks of OpenAI and SpaceX.
summary: Robinhood EU launched the first private company stock tokens for OpenAI and SpaceX, with free tokens claimable in-app by eligible users until July 7.
title: Robinhood is gifting OpenAI and SpaceX tokens to eligible European users.

data.title: OpenAI denies authorizing Robinhood to launch tokenized stocks
data.summary: OpenAI says Robinhood’s “OpenAI tokens” are unauthorized and not equity. Robinhood offers EU stock tokens without rights and other crypto services; Republic similar

content: PANews reported on July 3 that OpenAI stated on the social media platform X that the so-called "OpenAI tokens" launched by Robinhood were not authorized
OpenAI emphasized: "These tokens are not OpenAI's equity. We have not cooperated with Robinhood and do not approve of this behavior.
summary: OpenAI says Robinhood’s “OpenAI tokens” are unauthorized and not equity. Robinhood offers EU stock tokens without rights and other crypto services; Republic similar
title: OpenAI denies authorizing Robinhood to launch tokenized stocks

data.title: Web3 lawyers analyze in depth: Robinhood's stock tokens, innovation or crossing the line
data.summary: Robinhood launched stock tokens in Europe tied to SPV-held OpenAI/SpaceX shares; OpenAI says tokens aren’t equity; Lithuanian central bank probing

content: What is the OpenAI Token?** First, let’s take a look at what the so-called “OpenAI Token” is.
When investors buy OpenAI tokens, they are not buying actual OpenAI shares or shares of the SPV, but rather gaining indirect exposure to the price of OpenAI
summary: Robinhood launched stock tokens in Europe tied to SPV-held OpenAI/SpaceX shares; OpenAI says tokens aren’t equity; Lithuanian central bank probing
